name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: Provides health insurance cover of up to Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
documents_needed: SECC 2011 listing proof or e-Shram card
how_to_apply: Visit nearest Ayushman Bharat Kendra or Common Service Centre (CSC) with documents. ASHA worker can assist with verification.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
description: Cash assistance to pregnant women for institutional delivery to reduce maternal and infant mortality.
eligibility: Pregnant women, especially BPL and SC/ST households
Delivery at government or accredited private facility
how_to_apply: Register with local ASHA worker during pregnancy; cash assistance disbursed after institutional delivery.

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
description: Maternity benefit of Rs. 5,000 in installments for first living child, to compensate for wage loss during pregnancy.
eligibility: Excludes government employees with paid maternity leave
documents_needed: MCP card (Mother and Child Protection card)
how_to_apply: Register at Anganwadi Centre or nearest health facility with ASHA/Anganwadi worker support.

name: Swasthya Sathi (West Bengal State Health Scheme)
description: West Bengal state health scheme providing cashless treatment up to Rs. 5 lakh per family per year at empanelled hospitals.
eligibility: All residents of West Bengal (universal coverage)
Priority for families without other health cover
how_to_apply: Apply at Swasthya Sathi camps, Block Development Office, or online via the WB state portal.

name: National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS)
description: Monthly pension for persons with 80% or more disability, from BPL households.
how_to_apply: Apply at Block Development Office or Gram Panchayat with disability certificate.

name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households willing to do unskilled manual work.
eligibility: Adult member willing to do manual work
how_to_apply: Apply for Job Card at Gram Panchayat; demand work in writing; wages credited to bank account.

name: Kanyashree Prakalpa (West Bengal)
description: Conditional cash transfer for girls aged 13-18 to prevent child marriage and promote education; one-time grant of Rs. 25,000 at 18 if unmarried and continuing education.
eligibility: Unmarried girls aged 13-18, enrolled in school/college
Annual family income below Rs. 1.2 lakh
how_to_apply: Apply through school/college Kanyashree coordinator or online via WB Kanyashree portal.

name: National Scholarship Portal - SC/ST/OBC Post-Matric Scholarship
description: Financial assistance for SC/ST/OBC students pursuing post-matriculation studies to reduce dropout.
how_to_apply: Apply online at scholarships.gov.in (National Scholarship Portal); NGO or Common Service Centre can assist with the form.

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accidental death and disability insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakh at a premium of Rs. 20 per year.
how_to_apply: Enroll through bank branch or via auto-debit consent form at any bank offering the scheme.

name: Krishak Bandhu (West Bengal Farmer Support Scheme)
description: Income support to farmers, including a one-time death benefit of Rs. 2 lakh to the family in case of farmer's death.
eligibility: Farmer or farmer's family in West Bengal
how_to_apply: Apply at Block Agriculture Office or Gram Panchayat with land documents.

name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana - now merged into PM-JAY
description: Legacy scheme now subsumed under Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY for BPL families.
how_to_apply: Existing beneficiaries should check status with Ayushman Bharat Kendra; new applicants apply under PM-JAY directly.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers, guaranteeing a fixed monthly pension after age 60.
how_to_apply: Enroll through any bank or post office branch offering APY.
